ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Dialogo della bella creanza delle donne
ItacWorkItem.Notes: On the colophon: `Stampata in Brovazzo per dispetto d`un as(i)nazzo`. Probably printed in Venice. Shelfmark 716.b.42.(2.) has pp. 40. Translated in French in 1572 (probably by Marie de Romieu) as Instruction pour les jeunes dames par la mere et fille d`Alliance (Lyon 1572, 1573, and Paris 1597). Modern edition with critical intro. by C. Menna Scognamiglio (1992). Another translation is by Thierry de Timophile (alias Francois d`Amboise), Dialogues et devis des damoiselles (Versailles 1581, and Paris 1583).
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
